title: Early to Bed
writer: Lucien Littlefield, Chandler Sprague, Arthur Kober
actors: Mary Boland, Charles Ruggles, George Barbier
plot: Chester Beatty and Tessie Weeks have been engaged for 5 years and going together for 15 years before that. Chester is reluctant to burden Tessie with marriage because of his secret problem. He is a sleepwalker. When Tessie finally...
